title: ADRP Redstone
description: This pack adds a custom model to the redstone components
body:
This pack adds custom models to redstone components such as redstone, comparator, ..., but also rails (these are in progress though so they are not in the pack yet)

This pack was named RARE Redstone (RAphoulfifou's REsource pack) before but I changed my pseudo so the name of the pack too (ADRP for AelDit Resource Pack)

#

| Supported MC Version  | Up to date |
|:---------------------:|:----------:|
|       `1.17.x`        |     ❌     |
|       `1.18.x`        |     ❌     |
|       `1.19.x`        |     ✅     |

> If you have ideas you want to see added in this pack, you can make an issue explaining what you want to add, or a pull request (on the github page of the mod)
>
>![github_issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues-raw/Aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs?color=red&logo=github&style=for-the-badge) ![github_pull_requests](https://img.shields.io/github/issues-pr/Aeldit/MC-Resource-Packs?logo=github&style=for-the-badge)
